title: Garage / Gate Central
description:
With this function block, all Gates and Garage Door blocks can be controlled together
Double-click on the block to open the dialogue for selecting the linked blocks

inputs.description: Toggles between open, stop, close. For single button control.
Button 1: Complete open Button 4: Complete close
Pulse stops movement. On locks the block. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Disables inputs Tg, Co, Cc, T5 when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.
Moves door to partially open position if current position is different.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: All selected Gate/Garage function blocks can be controlled together.
